text:
or unless the HHA has first hand knowledge to the contrary. 

Similarly, a patient is entitled to reasonable and necessary Medicare home health services 
even if the patient would qualify for institutional care (e.g., hospital care or skilled 
nursing facility care) and Medicare payment should be made for reasonable and 
necessary home health services where the patient is also receiving supplemental services 
that do not meet Medicare’s definition of skilled nursing care or home health aide
